title: Ardent (disambiguation)
content:
There are five known ships with the name '''''Ardent''''':

*'''''[[Ardent (MC40a light cruiser)|Ardent]]''''', an [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].
*'''''[[Ardent (MC80 Star Cruiser)|Ardent]]''''', an [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] in the Alliance Fleet.
*'''[[Ardent-class fast frigate|''Ardent''-class fast frigate]]''', a warship in [[Fel Empire|Fel's]] and [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Krayt's Empires]].
*'''''[[Ardent IV]]''''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] cruiser in the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].

{{Disambig}}
